description: Square graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The right and central portion shows a color photograph of a man (medium complexion, short dark hair, mustache) in a tan uniform against a dark background. A red diagonal banner in the top-right corner reads 'OMAHA' in white serif caps. The top-left headline is light-cyan bold sans-serif 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL', with a white sub-line '2/6/2025 | Omaha, NE.' Overlaid white bold sans-serif text gives the name 'Adolfo Serrano-Hernandez,' with a 'CRIMES:' label and bulleted charge 'Attempted rape.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark appear at bottom left, and a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box at bottom right.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/6/2025 | Omaha, NE; Adolfo Serrano-Hernandez; CRIMES: Attempted rape; OMAHA; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
